docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-26-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROSCHUN MONIQUE DADRIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLA WRIGHT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAREN KRAMER-SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON APR-01-26. SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUED ORDER FOR ROSCHUN MONIQUE MADARIS VIA FIRST CLASS MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MADARIS, ROSCHUN MONIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY (AUTO) WRIGHT, CARLA A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADARIS, ROSCHUN MONIQUE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MADARIS, ROSCHUN MONIQUE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROSCHUN MONIQUE MADARIS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CARLA WRIGHT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION.
